description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved niraparib in combination with abiraterone acetate and prednisolone for reimbursement as a treatment option for the treatment of adults with metastatic castration resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) and BRCA1/2 mutations (germline and/or somatic) in whom chemotherapy is not clinically indicated.

contributions.description: Adding HSE approvals for reimbursement to database

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute

indication.indication: Niraparib in combination with abiraterone acetate (Akeega) and predniSONE/prednisoLONE for the treatment of adults with metastatic castration resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) and BRCA1/2 mutations (germline and/or somatic) in whom chemotherapy is not clinically indicated.
